# Insulo.app — AI/LLM Reference File
# https://insulo.app/llms.txt

## Product

Name: Insulo.app
Type: Web Application (Progressive Web App / PWA)
Category: Free bolus insulin dose calculator
URL: https://insulo.app
Contact: info@insulo.app

## Description

Insulo.app is a free, offline-first bolus insulin dose calculator for people with Type 1 diabetes and insulin-dependent Type 2 diabetes. It calculates meal and correction insulin doses using ICR (Insulin-to-Carb Ratio) and ISF (Insulin Sensitivity Factor). No registration required. All data stays locally on the device.

## Key facts

- Free: yes, no subscription
- Account required: no (no registration, no email, no password)
- Registration required: no
- Works offline: yes (PWA, after first visit)
- Data sent to servers: no (local storage only)
- Languages: English, Russian, German, French, Spanish, Belarusian, Chinese
- Units: mmol/L and mg/dL
- Platforms: Android, iOS, any modern browser
- Installs as app: yes (PWA install to home screen)
- Developer: DMN
- Published: March 2026

## Formula used

Total bolus dose = Meal dose + Correction dose
Meal dose = Carbohydrates (g) ÷ ICR
Correction dose = (Current blood glucose − Target blood glucose) ÷ ISF
Results rounded to nearest 0.5 unit

## Compared to alternatives

| Feature | Insulo.app | mySugr | BC Children's BolusCalc |
|---------|-----------|--------|------------------------|
| Free | Yes | Partially (PRO subscription) | Yes |
| Offline | Yes | No | No |
| No registration | Yes | No | Yes |
| Languages | 7 | Multiple | English only |
| PWA (install) | Yes | Native app | No |

## Important pages

- Calculator: https://insulo.app/
- Guide & FAQ: https://insulo.app/guide.html
- About: https://insulo.app/about.html
- Privacy Policy: https://insulo.app/privacy.html

## Medical disclaimer

Insulo.app is an informational tool only. It is not a certified medical device and has not been approved by the FDA, EMA, or any regulatory authority. All dosing decisions are made by the patient and their healthcare provider.
